page.title: Report Templates
page.description: Create branded templates for your PDF reports

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.description: Create a branded template to customize the look of your PDF reports

commercial.upgrade: Custom report templates require a commercial edition

form.name: Template name
form.nameHint: A descriptive name for this report template
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe when to use this template
form.descriptionHint: Optional description of when to use this template
form.logoHint: Upload a PNG or JPEG (max 2MB, resized to 400x200px)
form.footerTextPlaceholder: e.g., Confidential - For internal use only
form.sectionsHint: Select and reorder the sections to include

preview.error: Preview generation failed. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete template
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Reports using this template will fall back to the default layout.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.footerTooLong: Footer text must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.coverTitleTooLong: Cover title must be 255 characters or fewer
validation.coverSubtitleTooLong: Cover subtitle must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.logoInvalidType: Logo must be PNG or JPEG
validation.atLeastOneSection: At least one section must be enabled

limit.reached: Maximum of {max} templates reached for this workspace

errors.commercialFeature: Custom report templates require a commercial edition
errors.logoInvalidType: Logo must be PNG or JPEG
errors.duplicateName: A template with this name already exists
errors.uploadFailed: Logo upload failed. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to report templates in this workspace

reportsTemplates.templateSelectorHint: Apply a branded template to the PDF report
